description: Sector-specific screening controls for South African insurers, intermediaries, policyholder documents, underwriting, claims, market conduct, AML/CFT/CPF, and policyholder protection.

metadata.scope: South Africa-only sector overlay controls for Insurance Sector Compliance Overlay. Intended to be used with south_africa_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official South African legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Insurance Act 18 of 2017
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / Prudential Authority

primary_sources.name: Financial Sector Regulation Act 9 of 2017
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / FSCA / Prudential Authority

primary_sources.name: Financial Intelligence Centre Act, 2001 and FIC compliance guidance
Protection of Personal Information Act, 2013 (POPIA)
primary_sources.issuer: Information Regulator / Republic of South Africa

rules.title: Insurance licence, class, or Prudential Authority authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for insurer licence, insurance class, Prudential Authority, microinsurance, or authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Governance, fit-and-proper, or prudential risk-management evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for governance framework, key person, fit and proper, risk management, solvency, or prudential reporting evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Policyholder disclosure, claims, complaint, or fair-treatment evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for policyholder disclosures, claims handling, complaint handling, exclusions, waiting periods, or fair-treatment evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Insurance AML/CFT controls are present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for CDD, KYC, RMCP, beneficial ownership, suspicious transaction reporting, or sanctions screening evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Policyholder or claims-data privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for POPIA, personal information, policyholder data, claims data, consent, security safeguards, or breach response.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
